base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of font_dialogue_punctuation — a ui (typography) from 1986 legend of zelda. Punctuation + symbols — period/comma/apostrophe/exclamation/question-mark/dollar/hyphen/colon. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
